chess_method: Forecast -> Patch -> Proceed -> Verify (not a blocker)

moves.board_signal: census RED: 8/38 loops rule-1 'never produced receipt'; NONE class burns ~$20/mo
moves.immediate_goal: Classify all 8 receipt-less loops from evidence; no healing
moves.patch_before_execution: Preserve existing working capabilities. Use REMOVE ONLY for exact removals. Patch ambiguous wording before execution. Preserve: registry entries, live loops that ARE working, receipts ledger. No removals authorized unless explicitly named.
moves.commercial_consequence: Indirect: restores trust in registry so revenue loops can be believed; kills ~$20/mo dead spend after follow-up packets

moves.board_signal: Wiring currency for SG/NOOS/SourceA/Library unproven: alive docs data/agent_read_surfaces_v1.json and registry claims not re-verified since census RED; example packet 001 was never promoted to a real packet.
moves.immediate_goal: Promote the wiring audit to a real shadow packet: prove registry entries, alive-doc pointers, and receipt globs are current without agent self-report
moves.likely_misread: Auditor may 'fix' dangling pointers instead of reporting them
moves.second_move_risk: If wiring is stale, every campaign packet routes on wrong assumptions
moves.third_move_consequence: Phase 2 auto-dispatch built on a stale registry would misfire packets into dead lanes
moves.patch_before_execution: Report-only wording enforced: verdicts CURRENT|STALE|DANGLING|NO_RECEIPT per surface; repairs are separate packets
moves.commercial_consequence: Indirect: Phase 2 automation cannot ship on unproven wiring; blocks premature spend

moves.board_signal: trustfield.ca is live ('launch credibility pass active' per P10 product layer doc) with published claims: sandbox at /register, CAD 4,000 RPAA Readiness Discovery, partner surfaces. No receipt proves live pages currently match repo claims; deploy stamps unverified; L12 drift undetected.
moves.immediate_goal: External live-truth audit: fetch public trustfield.ca surfaces and diff against repo-documented claims and deploy receipts
moves.likely_misread: Auditor may treat marketing wording differences as drift, or follow redirects and mask broken routes
moves.second_move_risk: False-drift noise creates repair packets for non-problems
moves.third_move_consequence: Real drift left undetected becomes a public false claim — commercial credibility damage at first partner due-diligence
moves.patch_before_execution: Redirects OFF, full-body hash per URL (L4), classify diffs as CONTENT_DRIFT|ROUTE_DEAD|CLAIM_MISMATCH|COSMETIC; cosmetic is reportable not actionable
moves.commercial_consequence: Direct: protects the CAD 4,000 discovery offer funnel and partner due-diligence credibility; a dead /register route is lost revenue today
verification_after_execution: claims diff table vs repo docs

moves.board_signal: TrustField Partner Access OS funnel (apply -> email verify -> NDA -> briefing room) is the gated acquisition path for strategic contributors; feature parity and no-downgrade after launch credibility pass is unproven.
moves.immediate_goal: Walk the partner funnel as an outside user (sandbox scope), verify every step reachable and no capability silently downgraded
moves.likely_misread: Tester may create junk accounts in production or treat gated 403s as failures
moves.second_move_risk: Test artifacts pollute partner data; false RED on intentionally-gated steps
moves.third_move_consequence: Real funnel breakage found by a genuine director-track candidate instead of by us — lost strategic hire/partner
moves.patch_before_execution: Use clearly-labeled test identity, sandbox tier only; gated-by-design steps are PASS-gated not FAIL; no NDA actually signed
moves.commercial_consequence: Direct: this funnel is the acquisition route for partners and director-track candidates; each silent break costs conversions and credibility

moves.board_signal: commercial_pulse_queue_v1 exists (lane: metabolism) with CASL dispatchability predicates (named_icp_stranger, priced_offer_attached, casl_mailing_address, casl_unsubscribe, link_check_receipt...) but census shows REVENUE loop gateway_outbound_log_v1 with zero receipts (rule-4). Outbound commercial motion is designed but unproven.
moves.immediate_goal: Audit whether the commercial pulse loop can actually produce one dispatchable, CASL-compliant outbound draft — readiness only, nothing sent
protected_assets: founder approval gate before any send
moves.likely_misread: Auditor may draft-and-send, or mark predicates PASS from config presence rather than evidence
moves.second_move_risk: A non-compliant outbound send is an irreversible external action with legal exposure (CASL)
moves.third_move_consequence: Regulatory complaint or spam-flagging poisons the domain for all future TrustField outreach
moves.patch_before_execution: Send remains founder_blocked by state machine; audit checks each predicate with evidence; output is a readiness verdict per predicate, not a send
moves.commercial_consequence: Direct: unlocks the first compliant revenue outreach; every week the pulse loop stays unproven is a week of zero outbound pipeline

moves.board_signal: Census rule-2: META cost exceeds GUARD+REVENUE combined; NONE-class dead loops burn ~$20/mo; spend governor exists on paper (router rules) but has no enforcement receipt; no per-loop cost attribution receipts.
moves.immediate_goal: Spend-shape audit: attribute monthly cost per loop/value_class from evidence, flag every dollar with value_class none, verify governor thresholds are computable from receipts
moves.likely_misread: Auditor may recommend killing loops outright — decommission is an authority action, not an audit output
moves.second_move_risk: Miscounted costs lead to throttling a loop that was actually earning
moves.third_move_consequence: Wrong THROTTLED_ROI policy starves a revenue loop while dead META spend continues
moves.patch_before_execution: Output is attribution table + governor-computability verdict only; kill/throttle recommendations are ranked candidates, never actions
moves.commercial_consequence: Direct ROI: reclaims up to ~$20/mo immediately identifiable dead spend and makes L11 governor enforceable before Phase 2 spending starts
verification_after_execution: per-loop cost table sums to census totals
governor computability verdict with formula inputs evidenced

moves.board_signal: Phase 2 needs a supply of CLOUD_ONLY-safe packet templates; currently packets are authored ad hoc. No inventory exists of which recurring problems are cloud-executable end-to-end.
moves.immediate_goal: Discover and inventory every recurring problem class that is provably cloud-executable, producing Phase-2-ready packet templates
moves.likely_misread: Template generator may bake P0 reasoning into templates or over-generalize one-off tasks into fake recurring classes
moves.second_move_risk: Bad templates mass-produce bad packets in Phase 2 — error amplification
moves.third_move_consequence: Phase 2 autonomy ships packets nobody needed; ROI collapses and founder trust in autonomy resets to zero
moves.patch_before_execution: Every template must cite >=2 historical receipts proving the problem recurs; templates lint-checked with same rules as packets; P0-fingerprint sweep on all templates
moves.commercial_consequence: Indirect but compounding: this is the packet factory — it converts founder prompt-writing into a reusable asset (proof_asset)

moves.board_signal: Router doctrine says ~20% of work is Mac-bound, but no evidence-backed inventory exists of WHICH loops/tasks genuinely require local Mac state (launchd truth, local secrets, local repos) vs merely assumed to.
moves.immediate_goal: Produce the Mac-required truth list: for every registry motor and known task class, verdict CLOUD_OK|MAC_REQUIRED(reason)|UNKNOWN from repo evidence
moves.likely_misread: Auditor may try to probe the live Mac or enumerate secret names into a receipt
moves.second_move_risk: Secrets metadata leaks into a receipt that later syncs to cloud
moves.third_move_consequence: Credential exposure — one of the eight legitimate HARD_BLOCK reasons
moves.patch_before_execution: Evidence source is repo/config only; secrets referenced by opaque slot-id, never name/value; Mac probing forbidden in this packet
moves.commercial_consequence: Indirect: correct 80/20 split keeps Phase 2/3 costs at cloud prices and the Mac free for founder work
verification_after_execution: UNKNOWN rows carry explicit evidence gap

moves.board_signal: P0 leak detector exists (117 fingerprints) but has only ever scanned P0-PGR packets; legacy dispatch docs (docs/dispatch/*, docs/*DISPATCH*, handoff docs) predate the detector and were never swept.
moves.immediate_goal: Sweep every existing worker-facing prompt/dispatch document in the repo for P0 leakage and least-knowledge violations
moves.likely_misread: Sweeper may auto-redact legacy docs — edits to dispatch docs are repairs, not audit output
moves.second_move_risk: False positives on doctrine files that are ALLOWED to cite P0 (Base Live Brain surfaces)
moves.third_move_consequence: Either P0 leaks persist into agent context windows, or over-redaction breaks working dispatch docs
moves.patch_before_execution: Classify surfaces first (worker-facing vs brain-facing); only worker-facing surfaces are leak violations; report-only
moves.commercial_consequence: Indirect: P0 contains founder judgment/strategy — leakage into worker prompts is competitive and governance exposure
verification_after_execution: per-document leak verdict with fingerprint hit lines

moves.board_signal: Phase 2 requires ranked, evidence-backed dispatch candidates; ranking currently lives in founder judgment — exactly the workload P0-PGR exists to absorb.
moves.immediate_goal: Deterministically rank campaign packets M01-M09 for Phase 2 first-dispatch by roi x reversibility x cloud-safety x rewrite-likelihood, from their packet files and receipts
moves.likely_misread: Ranker may treat its own ranking as dispatch authorization
moves.second_move_risk: A self-authorized dispatch would violate shadow mode
moves.third_move_consequence: Trust reset: founder re-becomes the runtime, Phase 2 delayed
moves.patch_before_execution: Output is a ranked RECOMMENDATION receipt; dispatch_now stays false; Phase 2 unlock is an explicit founder decision recorded as its own receipt
moves.commercial_consequence: Indirect: shortest path to Phase 2 autonomy, which is where founder prompt-writing actually drops to ~0
verification_after_execution: ranking formula shown with inputs per packet

top_3_next_moves.why: Indirect but compounding: this is the packet factory — it converts founder prompt-writing into a reusable asset (proof_asset)
Indirect: shortest path to Phase 2 autonomy, which is where founder prompt-writing actually drops to ~0
Direct: protects the CAD 4,000 discovery offer funnel and partner due-diligence credibility; a dead /register route is lost revenue today

note: Shadow-only. dispatch_now=false on all moves. No audited issue is claimed fixed.
